TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
Gt_item_t TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF GT_item_S .
tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions.
tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: FROM vbrp INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF @lw_vbrp
READ TABLE gt_item INTO ls_item INDEX 1.
READ TABLE gt_item INTO ls_item INDEX 1.
* Ftech info for Mode Of Transport
lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_trnsprt_mode1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_trnsprt_mode1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_trnsprtr_name1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_trnsprtr_name1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_del1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_del1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_freight1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_freight1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_l_r_no1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_l_r_no1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_lr_dt1 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_lr_dt1 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_con wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_con SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_trnsprt_mode wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_trnsprt_mode SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE lv_text wa_lines-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_exm wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_exm SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_trnsprtr_name wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_trnsprtr_name SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_lr_dt wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_lr_dt SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_l_r_no wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_l_r_no SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_freight wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_freight SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_del wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_del SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_vhicl wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_vhicl SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_exp wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_exp SEPARATED BY space.
* lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_lutn2 wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_lutn2 SEPARATED BY space.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
lv_latrs CA ' ' OR lv_latrs EQ ' ' OR lv_latrs EQ space OR
CONCATENATE lv_line lv_latrs1 INTO lv_line SEPARATED BY ' '.
wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_po SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE lv_policy wa_lines-tdline INTO lv_policy SEPARATED BY space.
CONCATENATE LV_end wa_lines-tdline INTO LV_end SEPARATED BY space.
SELECT SINGLE adrnr FROM vbpa INTO lv_adrnr
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lv_lines INTO lines INDEX 1.
* gv_amt = ( ls_conditions-kwert * LS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_KOMK-KURRF ). "commented by mahadev sandip on 08/12/2025
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE lv_mat wa_lines-tdline INTO lv_mat SEPARATED BY space.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO wa_vbak WHERE vbeln = gs_item-aubel.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
CONCATENATE gv_span wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_span SEPARATED BY space.
IF gv_span IS INITIAL AND lv_mat IS INITIAL .
** DATA: lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF tline,
*SELECT SINGLE * FROM vbak INTO wa_vbak WHERE vbeln = gs_item-aubel.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE gv_span wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_span SEPARATED BY space.
MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_items COMPARING venum.
str1a = 'Office & Works :Gat No 25,37,43/1A At- Kavathe , Tal -Khandala Dist-Satara-412801'.
str1b = 'Office & Works :GAT NO. 289/1, KAPURHOL, TAL BHOR, DIST.PUNE,MAHARASHTRA, 412205'.

FORMS.FPCLINE: DATA : TEXT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
